expo.name: Local Artist Finder
expo.description: Discover local EDM events and artists near you. Browse upcoming shows, listen to artist previews, and get tickets to events in your area.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find local events near you.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: This app needs access to your contacts to help you find friends who are also using the app.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Local Artist Finder to use your location to find nearby events.
